member.name: T:Meridian.Domain.Collectors.IQuoteStateStore
member.summary: Provides access to the latest Best-Bid/Offer quote per symbol for downstream inference (e.g., aggressor side).

member.name: M:Meridian.Domain.Collectors.IQuoteStateStore.TryGet(System.String,Meridian.Contracts.Domain.Models.BboQuotePayload@)
member.summary: Try get the latest BBO for a symbol.

member.name: M:Meridian.Domain.Collectors.IQuoteStateStore.Upsert(Meridian.Contracts.Domain.Models.MarketQuoteUpdate)
member.summary: Upsert a BBO update and return the resulting payload that callers can reuse for publishing/logging.
member.remarks: Implementations should treat the incoming update as authoritative, replacing any existing entry for the symbol.

member.name: M:Meridian.Domain.Collectors.IQuoteStateStore.TryRemove(System.String,Meridian.Contracts.Domain.Models.BboQuotePayload@)
member.summary: Remove cached state for a symbol. Returns true if the symbol existed.

member.name: M:Meridian.Domain.Collectors.IQuoteStateStore.Snapshot
member.summary: Snapshot the current cache for inspection/monitoring without exposing internal mutability.

member.name: T:Meridian.Domain.Collectors.L3OrderBookCollector
member.summary: Maintains per-symbol L3 order books from individual order lifecycle events and emits both the raw L3 events and derived L2 snapshots (dual-write).
member.remarks:
Use this collector for providers that supply order-level (ITCH/PITCH-style) message feeds. Providers that only support MBP/L2 deltas should continue using instead.
Dual-write contract: every On* call publishes exactly two events in order — the L3 event followed by a derived (L2). Downstream consumers that only need L2 can filter by ; consumers that need order-level granularity subscribe to the L3 types (20–24).

member.name: M:Meridian.Domain.Collectors.L3OrderBookCollector.#ctor(Meridian.Domain.Events.IMarketEventPublisher,System.Boolean,System.String)
member.param: Publisher to receive both L3 and derived L2 events.
When , symbols must be registered via before events are processed.
Source identifier stamped on published s, e.g. "NYSE-ITCH". Defaults to "IB" for backward-compatibility with the rest of the Domain layer.

member.name: M:Meridian.Domain.Collectors.L3OrderBookCollector.GetCurrentSnapshot(System.String)
member.summary: Returns the current L2 snapshot derived from the L3 book for a symbol, or null if no book exists for that symbol. Thread-safe.

member.name: M:Meridian.Domain.Collectors.L3OrderBookCollector.GetTrackedSymbols
member.summary: Returns all symbols that currently have L3 order book data.

member.name: M:Meridian.Domain.Collectors.L3OrderBookCollector.OnOrderAdd(Meridian.Contracts.Domain.Models.OrderAdd)
member.summary: Processes a new-order event: publishes the L3 event followed by a derived L2 snapshot.

member.name: M:Meridian.Domain.Collectors.L3OrderBookCollector.OnOrderModify(System.DateTimeOffset,System.String,Meridian.Contracts.Domain.Models.OrderModify)
member.summary: Processes an order-modify event: publishes the L3 event followed by a derived L2 snapshot.

member.name: M:Meridian.Domain.Collectors.L3OrderBookCollector.OnOrderCancel(System.DateTimeOffset,System.String,Meridian.Contracts.Domain.Models.OrderCancel)
member.summary: Processes an order-cancel event: publishes the L3 event followed by a derived L2 snapshot.

member.name: M:Meridian.Domain.Collectors.L3OrderBookCollector.OnOrderExecute(System.DateTimeOffset,System.String,Meridian.Contracts.Domain.Models.OrderExecute)
member.summary: Processes an order-execute event: publishes the L3 event followed by a derived L2 snapshot.

member.name: M:Meridian.Domain.Collectors.L3OrderBookCollector.OnOrderReplace(System.DateTimeOffset,System.String,Meridian.Contracts.Domain.Models.OrderReplace)
member.summary: Processes an order-replace event: publishes the L3 event followed by a derived L2 snapshot.

member.name: T:Meridian.Domain.Collectors.L3OrderBookCollector.SymbolL3Book
member.summary: Per-symbol L3 order book that maintains individual order state and derives L2 views. Thread-safe via lock.

member.name: T:Meridian.Domain.Collectors.L3OrderBookCollector.SymbolL3Book.OrderState
member.summary: Immutable state for a single resting order.

member.name: M:Meridian.Domain.Collectors.L3OrderBookCollector.SymbolL3Book.OrderState.#ctor(Meridian.Contracts.Domain.Enums.OrderSide,System.Decimal,System.Int64)
member.summary: Immutable state for a single resting order.

member.name: M:Meridian.Domain.Collectors.L3OrderBookCollector.SymbolL3Book.BuildSnapshot(System.String,System.Nullable{System.DateTimeOffset},System.Int64,System.String,System.String,System.UInt16)
member.summary: Derives an L2 by aggregating all resting orders at each price level. Bids are sorted best-to-worst (descending price); asks ascending. Returns null when the book is empty.

member.name: T:Meridian.Domain.Collectors.MarketDepthCollector
member.summary: Maintains per-symbol Level-2 order books from depth deltas and emits L2 snapshots + depth integrity events.

member.name: M:Meridian.Domain.Collectors.MarketDepthCollector.GetCurrentSnapshot(System.String)
member.summary: Returns the current L2 order book snapshot for a symbol, or null if no book exists. Thread-safe: acquires a read lock on the internal buffer.

member.name: M:Meridian.Domain.Collectors.MarketDepthCollector.GetTrackedSymbols
member.summary: Returns all symbols that currently have order book data.

member.name: M:Meridian.Domain.Collectors.MarketDepthCollector.OnDepth(Meridian.Domain.Models.MarketDepthUpdate)
member.summary: Apply a single depth delta update.

member.name: M:Meridian.Domain.Collectors.MarketDepthCollector.SymbolOrderBookBuffer.GetSnapshot(System.String)
member.summary: Returns a read-only snapshot of the current order book state. Returns null if the book is empty.

member.name: T:Meridian.Domain.Collectors.OptionDataCollector
member.summary: Captures option quotes, trades, greeks, and chain snapshots, maintains per-contract state, and emits unified MarketEvents.

member.name: F:Meridian.Domain.Collectors.OptionDataCollector.MaxRecentTrades
member.summary: Maximum number of recent option trades to retain per contract.

member.name: M:Meridian.Domain.Collectors.OptionDataCollector.OnOptionQuote(Meridian.Contracts.Domain.Models.OptionQuote)
member.summary: Processes an incoming option quote and emits an OptionQuote market event.

member.name: M:Meridian.Domain.Collectors.OptionDataCollector.OnOptionTrade(Meridian.Contracts.Domain.Models.OptionTrade)
member.summary: Processes an incoming option trade and emits an OptionTrade market event.

member.name: M:Meridian.Domain.Collectors.OptionDataCollector.OnGreeksUpdate(Meridian.Contracts.Domain.Models.GreeksSnapshot)
member.summary: Processes an incoming greeks snapshot and emits an OptionGreeks market event.

member.name: M:Meridian.Domain.Collectors.OptionDataCollector.OnChainSnapshot(Meridian.Contracts.Domain.Models.OptionChainSnapshot)
member.summary: Processes an incoming option chain snapshot and emits an OptionChain market event.

member.name: M:Meridian.Domain.Collectors.OptionDataCollector.OnOpenInterestUpdate(Meridian.Contracts.Domain.Models.OpenInterestUpdate)
member.summary: Processes an incoming open interest update and emits an OpenInterest market event.

member.name: M:Meridian.Domain.Collectors.OptionDataCollector.GetLatestQuote(Meridian.Contracts.Domain.Models.OptionContractSpec)
member.summary: Returns the latest option quote for a contract, or null if none recorded.

member.name: M:Meridian.Domain.Collectors.OptionDataCollector.GetLatestGreeks(Meridian.Contracts.Domain.Models.OptionContractSpec)
member.summary: Returns the latest greeks snapshot for a contract, or null if none recorded.

member.name: M:Meridian.Domain.Collectors.OptionDataCollector.GetLatestChain(System.String,System.DateOnly)
member.summary: Returns the latest option chain snapshot for an underlying and expiration.

member.name: M:Meridian.Domain.Collectors.OptionDataCollector.GetChainsForUnderlying(System.String)
member.summary: Returns all cached chain snapshots for an underlying symbol.

member.name: M:Meridian.Domain.Collectors.OptionDataCollector.GetLatestOpenInterest(Meridian.Contracts.Domain.Models.OptionContractSpec)
member.summary: Returns the latest open interest update for a contract, or null if none recorded.

member.name: M:Meridian.Domain.Collectors.OptionDataCollector.GetRecentTrades(Meridian.Contracts.Domain.Models.OptionContractSpec,System.Int32)
member.summary: Returns recent option trades for a contract, newest first.

member.name: M:Meridian.Domain.Collectors.OptionDataCollector.GetQuotesForUnderlying(System.String)
member.summary: Returns all option quotes for a given underlying symbol.

member.name: M:Meridian.Domain.Collectors.OptionDataCollector.GetTrackedUnderlyings
member.summary: Returns all underlying symbols that have active option data.

member.name: M:Meridian.Domain.Collectors.OptionDataCollector.GetSummary
member.summary: Returns a summary snapshot of all option data currently held.

member.name: T:Meridian.Domain.Collectors.OptionDataCollector.RecentOptionTradeRing
member.summary: Thread-safe fixed-capacity ring buffer for recent option trades.

member.name: T:Meridian.Domain.Collectors.OptionDataSummary
member.summary: Summary of option data currently held by the collector.

member.name: M:Meridian.Domain.Collectors.OptionDataSummary.#ctor(System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.DateTimeOffset)
member.summary: Summary of option data currently held by the collector.

member.name: T:Meridian.Domain.Collectors.QuoteCollector
member.summary: Maintains per-symbol Best-Bid/Offer (BBO) state and emits BboQuote market events.

member.name: M:Meridian.Domain.Collectors.QuoteCollector.OnQuote(Meridian.Contracts.Domain.Models.MarketQuoteUpdate)
member.summary: Adapter entry point (e.g., Alpaca WebSocket quote updates).

member.name: T:Meridian.Domain.Collectors.SymbolSubscriptionTracker
member.summary: Provides common subscription management functionality for market data collectors. Thread-safe implementation using ConcurrentDictionary.

member.name: P:Meridian.Domain.Collectors.SymbolSubscriptionTracker.RequireExplicitSubscription
member.summary: Whether explicit subscription is required before processing updates.

member.name: M:Meridian.Domain.Collectors.SymbolSubscriptionTracker.RegisterSubscription(System.String)
member.summary: Registers a symbol for subscription.

member.name: M:Meridian.Domain.Collectors.SymbolSubscriptionTracker.UnregisterSubscription(System.String)
member.summary: Unregisters a symbol from subscription.

member.name: M:Meridian.Domain.Collectors.SymbolSubscriptionTracker.IsSubscribed(System.String)
member.summary: Checks if a symbol is currently subscribed.

member.name: M:Meridian.Domain.Collectors.SymbolSubscriptionTracker.TryAutoSubscribe(System.String)
member.summary: Attempts to auto-subscribe a symbol if explicit subscription is not required.

member.name: M:Meridian.Domain.Collectors.SymbolSubscriptionTracker.ShouldProcessUpdate(System.String)
member.summary: Checks if an update should be processed based on subscription state.

member.name: M:Meridian.Domain.Collectors.SymbolSubscriptionTracker.GetSubscribedSymbols
member.summary: Gets all currently subscribed symbols.

member.name: T:Meridian.Domain.Collectors.TradeDataCollector
member.summary: Captures tick-by-tick trades, maintains rolling order-flow statistics, and emits unified MarketEvents with strongly-typed payloads.

member.name: T:Meridian.Domain.Collectors.TradeDataCollector.StreamKey
member.summary: Typed key that combines symbol, stream, and venue for per-stream continuity tracking. Using strongly-typed components prevents accidental construction from unrelated strings. Venue is normalized to uppercase to preserve case-insensitive semantics across sources.

member.name: F:Meridian.Domain.Collectors.TradeDataCollector.MaxSymbolLength
member.summary: Maximum allowed length for a symbol. Covers most instrument types including options and futures.

member.name: F:Meridian.Domain.Collectors.TradeDataCollector.MaxRecentTrades
member.summary: Maximum number of recent trades to retain per symbol for API access.

member.name: M:Meridian.Domain.Collectors.TradeDataCollector.IsValidSymbolFormat(System.String,System.String@)
member.summary: Validates a symbol format. Valid symbols contain only alphanumeric characters, dots, hyphens, underscores, colons, or slashes.
member.param: When validation fails, contains the reason.

member.name: M:Meridian.Domain.Collectors.TradeDataCollector.OnTrade(Meridian.Domain.Models.MarketTradeUpdate)
member.summary: Entry point from router/adapter layer. Performs sequence continuity checks, emits Integrity events on anomalies, emits Trade + OrderFlow events on accepted updates.

member.name: M:Meridian.Domain.Collectors.TradeDataCollector.GetRecentTrades(System.String,System.Int32)
member.summary: Returns the most recent trades for a symbol (newest first), up to . Returns an empty list if no trades have been recorded for the symbol.

member.name: M:Meridian.Domain.Collectors.TradeDataCollector.GetOrderFlowSnapshot(System.String)
member.summary: Returns the current rolling order-flow statistics for a symbol, or null if no trades recorded.

member.name: M:Meridian.Domain.Collectors.TradeDataCollector.GetTrackedSymbols
member.summary: Returns all symbols that currently have trade data.

member.name: M:Meridian.Domain.Collectors.TradeDataCollector.SymbolTradeState.RegisterTradeAndBuildStats(Meridian.Contracts.Domain.Models.Trade,System.DateTimeOffset,System.String,System.Int64,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Registers a trade and builds order-flow statistics in a single lock acquisition, eliminating the double lock overhead of calling followed by separately.

member.name: T:Meridian.Domain.Collectors.TradeDataCollector.RecentTradeRing
member.summary: Thread-safe fixed-capacity ring buffer for recent trades.

member.name: M:Meridian.Domain.Collectors.TradeDataCollector.RecentTradeRing.GetRecent(System.Int32)
member.summary: Returns up to recent trades, newest first.

member.name: T:Meridian.Domain.Events.IBackpressureSignal
member.summary: Exposes pipeline backpressure state so upstream producers can self-throttle instead of having events silently dropped.
member.remarks: Producers (adapters, collectors) should query before publishing a new event and pause or reduce their publishing rate when the signal is active. The property can be used for more nuanced throttling (e.g. introduce delay when utilization exceeds a threshold).

member.name: P:Meridian.Domain.Events.IBackpressureSignal.IsUnderPressure
member.summary: Returns when the downstream queue utilization has reached or exceeded the warning threshold (typically 80 %). Producers should pause or slow down when this returns .

member.name: P:Meridian.Domain.Events.IBackpressureSignal.QueueUtilization
member.summary: Current queue fill level as a value between 0.0 and 1.0 (0 % – 100 %). Useful for graduated throttling: e.g. skip non-critical events above 0.9.

member.name: T:Meridian.Domain.Events.IMarketEventPublisher
member.summary: Minimal publish contract so collectors can emit MarketEvents without knowing transport. Publish must be non-blocking (hot path).

member.name: M:Meridian.Domain.Events.MarketEvent.StampReceiveTime(System.Nullable{System.DateTimeOffset})
member.summary: Stamps the event with wall-clock and monotonic receive timestamps. Call this at the earliest point when the event enters the system.

member.name: P:Meridian.Domain.Events.MarketEvent.EffectiveSymbol
member.summary: Returns the effective symbol for downstream consumers: when available, otherwise the raw . Use this property in storage paths, dedup keys, metrics labels, and quality monitoring to ensure consistent behavior regardless of canonicalization state.

member.name: M:Meridian.Domain.Events.MarketEvent.StampTraceContext(System.Diagnostics.ActivityContext)
member.summary: Stamps the event with trace context captured at ingress so downstream sinks, logs, and dead-letter flows can correlate records without relying on ambient Activity state.

member.name: P:Meridian.Domain.Events.MarketEvent.EstimatedLatencyMs
member.summary: Computes the estimated end-to-end latency in milliseconds using monotonic clock, or falls back to wall-clock difference if monotonic data is unavailable.

member.name: T:Meridian.Domain.Events.MarketEventPayload
member.summary: Discriminated-union base for domain-layer market event payloads. Models are consolidated in the Contracts project as single source of truth. Keep the [JsonDerivedType] list in sync with Contracts/Domain/Events/MarketEventPayload.cs.

member.name: T:Meridian.Domain.Events.Publishers.CompositePublisher
member.summary: Composite publisher that publishes events to multiple publishers. Returns true if at least one publisher succeeds.

member.name: T:Meridian.Domain.Events.PublishResult
member.summary: Detailed result of a call. Provides richer information than a plain so that producers can make informed throttling decisions rather than silently dropping events.
member.remarks: Use EventPipeline.TryPublishWithResult when you need the detailed result. The original continues to return for backward compatibility.

member.name: F:Meridian.Domain.Events.PublishResult.Accepted
member.summary: The event was accepted and enqueued for processing.

member.name: F:Meridian.Domain.Events.PublishResult.AcceptedUnderPressure
member.summary: The event was accepted but the pipeline queue is approaching capacity (≥ 80 %). Producers should consider slowing down or reducing the rate of publication.

member.name: F:Meridian.Domain.Events.PublishResult.Dropped
member.summary: The event was not accepted because the pipeline queue was full and the active backpressure policy rejected the write (for example, DropWrite pre-checks or a failed TryWrite on the underlying channel). This result corresponds to returning and does not include silent evictions that may occur in DropOldest/DropNewest modes.

member.name: T:Meridian.Domain.Models.AggregateBar
member.summary: Represents a real-time OHLCV aggregate bar from streaming data providers. Unlike which uses DateOnly for daily bars, this model uses DateTimeOffset to support intraday timeframes (second, minute, etc.).
member.remarks: Polygon.io provides two aggregate event types: - "A" (per-second aggregates) - "AM" (per-minute aggregates)

member.name: P:Meridian.Domain.Models.AggregateBar.Symbol
member.summary: The ticker symbol for this aggregate.

member.name: P:Meridian.Domain.Models.AggregateBar.StartTime
member.summary: The start timestamp of the aggregate window (UTC).

member.name: P:Meridian.Domain.Models.AggregateBar.EndTime
member.summary: The end timestamp of the aggregate window (UTC).

member.name: P:Meridian.Domain.Models.AggregateBar.Open
member.summary: Opening price of the aggregate window.

member.name: P:Meridian.Domain.Models.AggregateBar.High
member.summary: Highest price during the aggregate window.

member.name: P:Meridian.Domain.Models.AggregateBar.Low
member.summary: Lowest price during the aggregate window.

member.name: P:Meridian.Domain.Models.AggregateBar.Close
member.summary: Closing price of the aggregate window.

member.name: P:Meridian.Domain.Models.AggregateBar.Volume
member.summary: Total volume during the aggregate window.

member.name: P:Meridian.Domain.Models.AggregateBar.Vwap
member.summary: Volume-weighted average price for the aggregate window.

member.name: P:Meridian.Domain.Models.AggregateBar.TradeCount
member.summary: Number of trades in the aggregate window.

member.name: P:Meridian.Domain.Models.AggregateBar.Timeframe
member.summary: The timeframe of this aggregate (e.g., "second", "minute").

member.name: P:Meridian.Domain.Models.AggregateBar.Source
member.summary: Data source that provided this aggregate.

member.name: P:Meridian.Domain.Models.AggregateBar.SequenceNumber
member.summary: Sequence number for ordering.

member.name: T:Meridian.Domain.Models.AggregateTimeframe
member.summary: Timeframe for aggregate bars.

member.name: F:Meridian.Domain.Models.AggregateTimeframe.Second
member.summary: Per-second aggregate (Polygon "A" event).

member.name: F:Meridian.Domain.Models.AggregateTimeframe.Minute
member.summary: Per-minute aggregate (Polygon "AM" event).

member.name: F:Meridian.Domain.Models.AggregateTimeframe.Hour
member.summary: Hourly aggregate.

member.name: F:Meridian.Domain.Models.AggregateTimeframe.Day
member.summary: Daily aggregate.

member.name: T:Meridian.Domain.Models.MarketDepthUpdate
member.summary: Normalized L2 depth delta update (adapter input into MarketDepthCollector). Operation values align with IB: 0=Insert, 1=Update, 2=Delete. Side values align with our OrderBookSide. Uses decimal for financial precision.

member.name: M:Meridian.Domain.Models.MarketDepthUpdate.#ctor(System.DateTimeOffset,System.String,System.UInt16,Meridian.Contracts.Domain.Enums.DepthOperation,Meridian.Contracts.Domain.Enums.OrderBookSide,System.Decimal,System.Decimal,System.String,System.Int64,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Normalized L2 depth delta update (adapter input into MarketDepthCollector). Operation values align with IB: 0=Insert, 1=Update, 2=Delete. Side values align with our OrderBookSide. Uses decimal for financial precision.

member.name: T:Meridian.Domain.Models.MarketTradeUpdate
member.summary: Normalized tick-by-tick trade update (adapter input into TradeDataCollector). This is NOT the stored Trade; it's the raw-ish input model.

member.name: M:Meridian.Domain.Models.MarketTradeUpdate.#ctor(System.DateTimeOffset,System.String,System.Decimal,System.Int64,Meridian.Contracts.Domain.Enums.AggressorSide,System.Int64,System.String,System.String,System.String[])
member.summary: Normalized tick-by-tick trade update (adapter input into TradeDataCollector). This is NOT the stored Trade; it's the raw-ish input model.
